links.sentence: Castle in the Sky, also known as Laputa: Castle in the Sky, is a 1986 Japanese animated fantasy adventure film written and directed by Hayao Miyazaki.

My Neighbor Totoro is a 1988 Japanese animated fantasy film written and directed by Hayao Miyazaki and animated by Studio Ghibli for Tokuma Shoten.

Nausicaä of the Valley of the Wind is a 1984 Japanese animated post-apocalyptic fantasy film written and directed by Hayao Miyazaki, based on his 1982 manga Nausicaä of the Valley of the Wind.

Princess Mononoke is a 1997 Japanese animated historical fantasy film written and directed by Hayao Miyazaki.

Spirited Away is a 2001 Japanese animated fantasy film written and directed by Hayao Miyazaki.
